results.title: 'Bakla-baklaan' for the views? The debate over queer aesthetics online
results.description: LAPU-LAPU CITY, Cebu — A man confidently struts in a dress. Another films himself applying makeup before breaking into a dance. Their videos rack up millions of views—and equally divided reactions. Some viewers applaud them for challenging traditional gender norms. Others argue they are profiting from queer aesthetics without carrying the struggles behind them. Beneath [...]... Keep on reading: 'Bakla-baklaan' for the views? The debate over queer aesthetics online
